stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 2, when a controlled flight inadvertently deviates from its flight plan, ATS must be informed when…

options.a: the average TAS varies by plus or minus 5% from the flight-plan TAS.
options.b: any track deviation exceeds 2 NM from the ATS route centreline for more than one minute.
options.c: there is any deviation in TAS.
options.d: the time estimate to the next reporting point is in error by more than one minute.
